author: cleoche
description: Integrate long blocks of text into callouts.

manifest.author: Cleoche
manifest.description: Integrate long blocks of text into callouts and easier nested callouts
manifest.name: Callout Integrator

name: Callout Integrator

releases.author: Cleoche
releases.description:
# Minor Fix
Changed behavior of integrating a line when the curser is at the very beginning of the line.

releases.author: Cleoche
releases.description:
# Behavior Update and Code Overhaul
Updated behavior for integrating selections that begin partway through a line. Before, it would add the '> ' wherever the selection began. Now, it adds it at the beginning of the line. Likewise, for un-integrating, it would only un-integrate highlighted characters. Now, it un-integrates the whole line where the highlight begins. 

Completely rewrote code to be more efficient and concise.

releases.author: Cleoche
releases.description:
# Added icon for mobile toolbar
Plus minor code changes; functionality remains the same.

releases.author: Cleoche
releases.description:
## Release 1.1.0

### New Functionality
Added ability to integrate line containing cursor without the need to highlight.

### Bug Fixes
Fixed bug that would un-highlight text after running function.

releases.author: Cleoche
releases.description: Fixed bug you couldn't download the plugin through obsidian due to a "Plugin ID Mismatch."

releases.author: Cleoche
releases.description:
Added functionality and bug fixes: 

- fixed first line not indenting properly
- fixed nested callouts integration
- added un-integrate function

Note:
- tested on MacOS, iOS, iPadOS, Android, and Window
